summary: Show each project task's real approval route without unrelated project stages or a synthetic submission node.

notes: No database changes; runtime approval nodes and audit records remain unchanged.
Projects in mixed timesheets now display only their own applicable approval stages and statuses.
Business-type nodes marked not applicable are omitted from the project chain instead of appearing as passed stages.
Historical not-applicable audit records are labelled explicitly as not applicable rather than approved.
The synthetic submission card is removed so the diagram starts at the first real approval stage.
Desktop and mobile task details use the same project-scoped chain projection.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run build with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.19.1.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.19.1.
Run the production timesheet-withdraw smoke test in a rollback transaction.
